016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026
027/**
028 * Base for simple comma-separated token lists.
029 *
030 * @since 9.2.1
031 */
032@SuppressWarnings({
033   "java:S2160", // equals() on HttpHeaderBean uses name + getValue(); typed state is reflected in getValue()
034   "unchecked" // Supplier<?> branches cast to typed suppliers after lazy-mode check
035})
036public class HttpCsvHeader extends HttpHeaderBean {
037
038   public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING = 0;
039   public static final int LAZY_TOKENS = 1;
040
041   private final String[] eagerTokens;
042   private final Supplier<?> lazySupplier;
043   private final int lazyMode;
044
045   /**
046    * Creates an {@link HttpCsvHeader} by parsing the given comma-delimited wire value.
047    *
048    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
049    * @param wireValue Wire value. May be {@code null} or empty.
050    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
051    */
052   public static HttpCsvHeader of(String name, String wireValue) {
053      return new HttpCsvHeader(name, wireValue);
054   }
055
056   /**
057    * Creates an {@link HttpCsvHeader} with the given typed values.
058    *
059    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
060    * @param typedValues The token values. May be {@code null}.
061    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
062    */
063   public static HttpCsvHeader of(String name, String...typedValues) {
064      return new HttpCsvHeader(name, typedValues);
065   }
066
067   protected HttpCsvHeader(String name, String value) {
068      super(name, value);
069      this.eagerTokens = null;
070      this.lazySupplier = null;
071      this.lazyMode = -1;
072   }
073
074   protected HttpCsvHeader(String name, String... values) {
075      super(name, values == null || values.length == 0 ? null : join(values, ", "));
076      this.eagerTokens = values == null ? null : copyOf(values);
077      this.lazySupplier = null;
078      this.lazyMode = -1;
079   }
080
081   protected HttpCsvHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
082      super(name, lazyMode == LAZY_WIRE_STRING
083         ? ((Supplier<String>) supplier)::get
084         : () -> {
085            var t = ((Supplier<String[]>) supplier).get();
086            if (t == null)
087               return null;
088            return join(t, ", ");
089         });
090      this.eagerTokens = null;
091      this.lazySupplier = supplier;
092      this.lazyMode = lazyMode;
093   }
094
095   public Optional<String[]> asArray() {
096      return o(copyOf(csvTokens()));
097   }
098
099   public Optional<List<String>> asList() {
100      return o(u(l(csvTokens())));
101   }
102
103   public boolean contains(String val) {
104      var t = csvTokens();
105      if (t == null)
106         return false;
107      for (var v : t)
108         if (eq(v, val))
109            return true;
110      return false;
111   }
112
113   public boolean containsIgnoreCase(String val) {
114      var t = csvTokens();
115      if (t == null)
116         return false;
117      for (var v : t)
118         if (eqic(v, val))
119            return true;
120      return false;
121   }
122
123   @Override
124   public String getValue() {
125      var t = csvTokens();
126      return t == null ? null : join(t, ", ");
127   }
128
129   public String[] orElse(String[] other) {
130      var x = csvTokens();
131      return nn(x) ? x : other;
132   }
133
134   public String[] toArray() {
135      return copyOf(csvTokens());
136   }
137
138   public List<String> toList() {
139      return u(l(csvTokens()));
140   }
141
142   private String[] csvTokens() {
143      if (lazyMode == LAZY_TOKENS)
144         return ((Supplier<String[]>) lazySupplier).get();
145      if (eagerTokens != null)
146         return eagerTokens;
147      return splita(super.getValue());
148   }
149}
